# defaults

Package defaults provides an in-memory store.Store adapter, typically
used as the lowest-precedence layer in a store.Chain.

## Reference

- API: <https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/dangernoodle-io/mcpkit/store/defaults>
- Guide: [defaults guide](https://github.com/dangernoodle-io/mcpkit/wiki/Store-Defaults)
